emergency_definition: No heat in winter for elderly or infant household
Complete AC failure in Phoenix summer above 105 degrees
System actively leaking refrigerant or water into the building
Heat pump making loud grinding or screeching noise and just stopped working in summer months
non_emergency_routing_rules: Collect their info and tell them we'll call first thing

call_transfer_rules.fail_message: Collect name, number, address and tell them a tech will call within 20 minutes

integration_constraints: Residential calls create ServiceTitan job automatically
Commercial calls do not create ServiceTitan job automatically
after_hours_flow_summary: Collect their info and tell them we'll call first thing
